model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible * post + C(year) + C(statefip) + birthyr_c + I(birthyr_c ** 2) + C(sex) + DRIVERSLICENSES + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES + UNEMP + LFPR", data=df, weights=df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": df["statefip"]})
